revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 5 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 5 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月5日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の5日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[康元]]元年（[[1256年]]_月_日） - 康元に改元 * [[文永]]11年（[[1274年]]_月_日） - [[元]]軍が対馬・壱岐に初来襲。[[文永の役]]が始まる * [[明徳]]3年(閏10月)（[[1392年]]_月_日） - 南北朝合一。南朝の後亀山天皇が北朝の後小松天皇に三種の神器を譲る
== 誕生日 == * [[安永]]2年（[[1773年]][[11月18日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]、[[江戸幕府]]11代将軍（+ [[1841年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月4日 (旧暦)|10月4日]] 翌日[[10月6日 (旧暦)|10月6日]] - 前月[[9月5日 (旧暦)|9月5日]] 翌月[[11月5日 (旧暦)|11月5日]] *新暦[[10月5日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== Deaths == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[11月6日]]） - [[教如]]、[[浄土真宗]]の僧侶、[[東本願寺]]第12代[[法主]]（* [[1558年]]） * [[寛永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1630年]][[11月9日]]） - [[藤堂高虎]]、[[武将]]（* [[1556年]]）
== Commemorations ==

<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October5れきじゅうがついつか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の5日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。

revision.text:
[[sn:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}. == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}}'s {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}}, is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}}, {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}}, and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}}, and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}}, respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}}.
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}}.
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}}, 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}}, monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}}, 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}}).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}}, {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}. == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}}'s {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}}, is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}}, {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}}, and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}}, and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}}, respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}}.
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}}.
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}}, 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}}, monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}}, 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}}).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}}, {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}}, {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

[[sn:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}. == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}}'s {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}}, is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}}, {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}}, and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}}, and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}}, respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}}.
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}}.
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}}, 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}}, monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}}, 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}}).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}}, {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}. == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}}'s {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}}, is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}}, {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}}, and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}}, and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}}, respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}}.
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}}.
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}}, 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}}, monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}}, 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}}).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}}, {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}}).
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}. == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}}'s {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}}, is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}}, {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}}, and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}}, and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}}, respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}}) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}}.
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}}'s {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}}.
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}}, 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}}, monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}}, 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}}).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}}, {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}}).
== Commemorations ==

Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[October 5 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

revision.comment: Fixing the qq replacement as it causes problems in a lot of pages
revision.text:
[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).

* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).
== Commemorations == == See Also ==

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year }} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年}} ).

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year }} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year }} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year }} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year }} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==

* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year }} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year }} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year }} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year }} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year }} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year }} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year }} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year }} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year }} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year }} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]]
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]]

* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|12=draft}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|12=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|12=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|12=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|12=draft|12=draft}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|12=draft|12=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|12=draft|12=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|12=draft|12=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==

* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|12=draft|12=draft}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|12=draft|12=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|12=draft|12=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|12=draft|12=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
