revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|12=draft|12=draft}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|12=draft|12=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|12=draft|12=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|12=draft|12=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is elevated to the rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:ctober 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:October 5 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

{{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar October]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Days 5 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] }}
[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:ctober 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:October 5 (Lunisolar)]]

[[Category:pages to sort]][[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-yue:十月初五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==

* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:ctober 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:October 5 (Lunisolar)]]

[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 5 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 5 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 5 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 5 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 5 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 5 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

Text replacement - "|Julian calendar|" to "|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|"
Text replacement - "|1=Julian calendar|" to "|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|"

getting rid of this category. It is not useful
doing this because it is quite important for standardization in my corrections system
revision.text:
{{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|qq=}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|qq=}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|qq=}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|qq=}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|qq=}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|qq=}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|qq=}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|qq=}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|qq=}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|qq=}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|qq=}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|qq=}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|qq=}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|qq=}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|qq=}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|qq=}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|qq=}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|qq=}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} {{draft categories|
|qq=}}
{{draft categories| |qq=}}
{{draft categories| |qq=}}

revision.comment: 23 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:10月5日 (旧暦) up to rev 51037575
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月5日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがついつか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の5日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[永祚 (日本)|永祚]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[990年]][[10月26日]]）[[一条天皇]]の[[女御]][[藤原定子]]が立后される。[[太皇太后]]は[[冷泉天皇]]の后[[昌子内親王]]、[[皇太后]]は一条天皇の母[[藤原詮子]]、[[中宮]]（[[皇后]]）は[[円融天皇|円融上皇]]の后[[藤原遵子]]と、[[三后]]の位が全てふさがっていたため、遵子が「皇后宮」、定子が「中宮」と称される（＝皇后・中宮並立の初例）。 * [[康元]]元年（同[[1256年]][[10月24日]]）[[建長]]から康元に[[改元]]する。 * [[文永]]11年（同[[1274年]][[11月4日]]）[[元 (王朝)|元]]軍が対馬・壱岐に初来襲。[[文永の役]]が始まる。 * [[明徳]]3年／[[元中]]9年閏10月（同[[1392年]][[11月19日]]） - [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝合一]]。[[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]の[[後亀山天皇]]が[[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]の[[後小松天皇]]に[[三種の神器]]を譲る（[[明徳の和約]]）
== 誕生日 == * [[安永]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1773年]][[11月18日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]、[[江戸幕府]]11代将軍（+ [[1841年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[11月6日]]） - [[教如]]、[[浄土真宗]]の僧侶、[[東本願寺]]第12代[[法主]]（* [[1558年]]） * [[寛永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1630年]][[11月9日]]） - [[藤堂高虎]]、[[武将]]（* [[1556年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[10月5日 (旧暦)]] to [[October 5 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月5日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがついつか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の5日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[永祚 (日本)|永祚]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[990年]][[10月26日]]）[[一条天皇]]の[[女御]][[藤原定子]]が立后される。[[太皇太后]]は[[冷泉天皇]]の后[[昌子内親王]]、[[皇太后]]は一条天皇の母[[藤原詮子]]、[[中宮]]（[[皇后]]）は[[円融天皇|円融上皇]]の后[[藤原遵子]]と、[[三后]]の位が全てふさがっていたため、遵子が「皇后宮」、定子が「中宮」と称される（＝皇后・中宮並立の初例）。 * [[康元]]元年（同[[1256年]][[10月24日]]）[[建長]]から康元に[[改元]]する。 * [[文永]]11年（同[[1274年]][[11月4日]]）[[元 (王朝)|元]]軍が対馬・壱岐に初来襲。[[文永の役]]が始まる。 * [[明徳]]3年／[[元中]]9年閏10月（同[[1392年]][[11月19日]]） - [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝合一]]。[[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]の[[後亀山天皇]]が[[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]の[[後小松天皇]]に[[三種の神器]]を譲る（[[明徳の和約]]）
== 誕生日 == * [[安永]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1773年]][[11月18日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]、[[江戸幕府]]11代将軍（+ [[1841年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1614年]][[11月6日]]） - [[教如]]、[[浄土真宗]]の僧侶、[[東本願寺]]第12代[[法主]]（* [[1558年]]） * [[寛永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1630年]][[11月9日]]） - [[藤堂高虎]]、[[武将]]（* [[1556年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005}}

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|qq=}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|qq=}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|qq=}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|qq=}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|qq=}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|qq=}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|qq=}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|qq=}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|qq=}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|qq=}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|qq=}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|qq=}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|qq=}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|qq=}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|qq=}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|qq=}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|qq=}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|qq=}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations ==

* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. * {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=|12=draft|12=draft}} .

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初五]]
{{translated page|ja|10月5日 (旧暦)|version=51037575|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 5일]] [[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月初五]] [[en:draft:October 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:ctober 5 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:October 5 (Lunisolar)]]

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiso (Japan)|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|990|ja|990th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/990|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 26|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichijō|qq=}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Teishi|qq=}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Grand Empress Dowager|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager|qq=}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Princess Masako|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Junshi|qq=}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgen (Japan)|qq=}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1256|qq=}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 24|qq=}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchō (era)|qq=}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bun'ei|qq=}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274th year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1274|qq=}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 4|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mongol Empire|qq=}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Bun'ei|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku|qq=}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genchū|qq=}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1392|qq=}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 19|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanboku-chō period|qq=}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Kameyama|qq=}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|qq=}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Komatsu|qq=}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1773|qq=}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 18|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ienari|qq=}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1841|qq=}} ).

* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku|qq=}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genchū|qq=}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1392|qq=}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 19|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanboku-chō period|qq=}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Kameyama|qq=}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|qq=}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Komatsu|qq=}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1773|qq=}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 18|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ienari|qq=}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1841|qq=}} ).

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiso (Japan)|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|990|ja|990年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/990|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 26|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichijō|qq=}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Teishi|qq=}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Grand Empress Dowager|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager|qq=}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Princess Masako|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Junshi|qq=}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgen (Japan)|qq=}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1256|qq=}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 24|qq=}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchō (era)|qq=}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bun'ei|qq=}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1274|qq=}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 4|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mongol Empire|qq=}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Bun'ei|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku|qq=}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genchū|qq=}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1392|qq=}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 19|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanboku-chō period|qq=}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Kameyama|qq=}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|qq=}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Komatsu|qq=}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773rd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1773|qq=}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 18|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ienari|qq=}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1841|qq=}} ).

* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bun'ei|qq=}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1274|qq=}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 4|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mongol Empire|qq=}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Bun'ei|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku|qq=}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genchū|qq=}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392nd year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1392|qq=}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 19|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanboku-chō period|qq=}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Kameyama|qq=}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|qq=}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Komatsu|qq=}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1773|qq=}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 18|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ienari|qq=}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841st year|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1841|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1614|qq=}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 6|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi Hongan-ji|qq=}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1558|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ei|qq=}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1630|qq=}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 9|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōdō Takatora|qq=}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1556|qq=}} ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} . == Events ==
* {{ill|Eiso (Japan)|ja|永祚 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiso (Japan)|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|990|ja|990年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/990|qq=}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 26|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichijō|qq=}} 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|ja|藤原定子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Teishi|qq=}} , is elevated to the Rank of consort. * {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bun'ei|qq=}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1274|qq=}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 4|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mongol Empire|qq=}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Bun'ei|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku|qq=}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genchū|qq=}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1392|qq=}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 19|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanboku-chō period|qq=}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Kameyama|qq=}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|qq=}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Komatsu|qq=}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
