Since the positions of {{ill|Grand Empress Dowager|ja|太皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Grand Empress Dowager|qq=}} , {{ill|Empress Dowager|ja|皇太后|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Dowager|qq=}} , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by {{ill|Imperial Princess Masako|ja|昌子内親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Princess Masako|qq=}} , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and {{ill|Fujiwara no Junshi|ja|藤原遵子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Junshi|qq=}} , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* {{ill|Kōgen (Japan)|ja|康元|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōgen (Japan)|qq=}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1256|ja|1256年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1256|qq=}} {{ill|October 24|ja|10月24日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 24|qq=}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kenchō (era)|ja|建長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenchō (era)|qq=}} to Kōgen.
* {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bun'ei|qq=}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|ja|1274年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1274|qq=}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 4|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Mongol Empire|ja|元 (王朝)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mongol Empire|qq=}} invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the {{ill|Battle of Bun'ei|ja|文永の役|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Bun'ei|qq=}} .
* {{ill|Meitoku|ja|明徳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku|qq=}} 3 / {{ill|Genchū|ja|元中|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genchū|qq=}} 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian {{ill|1392|ja|1392年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1392|qq=}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 19|qq=}} ) – The {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|ja|南北朝時代 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanboku-chō period|qq=}} ends as the {{ill|Southern Court (Japan)|ja|南朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Kameyama|ja|後亀山天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Kameyama|qq=}} surrenders the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|ja|三種の神器|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Regalia of Japan|qq=}} to the {{ill|Northern Court (Japan)|ja|北朝 (日本)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Court (Japan)|qq=}} 's {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Komatsu|qq=}} , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1773|qq=}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 18|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ienari|qq=}} , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1841|ja|1841年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1841|qq=}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1614|ja|1614年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1614|qq=}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 6|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=}} of {{ill|Higashi Hongan-ji|ja|東本願寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi Hongan-ji|qq=}} (* {{ill|1558|ja|1558年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1558|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ei|qq=}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1630|ja|1630年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1630|qq=}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 9|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|ja|藤堂高虎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōdō Takatora|qq=}} , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=}} (* {{ill|1556|ja|1556年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1556|qq=}} ).
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).

{{Not to be confused with|October 5 (Lunisolar)}}<!--hatnote--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "<!--hatnote-->" to "[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->"
revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 5|qq=October 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==

{{Not to be confused with|October 5|qq=October 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|4|10|6|9|5|11|10|1005|qq=}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=}} .

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=|1=Nyōgo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10942767}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=|1=Meitoku Peace Accord|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11087845}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=|1=Kyōnyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6547451}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=|1=Hōshu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11554990}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840255]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 5|qq=October 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=|1=Nyōgo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10942767}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=|1=Meitoku Peace Accord|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11087845}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=|1=Kyōnyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6547451}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=|1=Hōshu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11554990}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840255]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 5|qq=October 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=|1=Nyōgo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10942767}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=|1=Meitoku Peace Accord|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11087845}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=|1=Kyōnyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6547451}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=|1=Hōshu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11554990}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).
== Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 5일]][[zh min nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月初五]][[zh:十月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840255]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 5|qq=October 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|qq=|1=Nyōgo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10942767}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=|1=Meitoku Peace Accord|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11087845}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).

* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).

Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|qq=|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|qq=|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|qq=|1=Meitoku Peace Accord|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11087845}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|qq=|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|qq=|1=Kyōnyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6547451}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|qq=|1=Hōshu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11554990}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初五]][[zh:十月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840255]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 5|qq=October 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|1=Nyōgo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10942767}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|1=Meitoku Peace Accord|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11087845}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|1=Kyōnyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6547451}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|1=Hōshu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11554990}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初五]][[zh:十月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840255]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 5|qq=October 5}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events ==
* [[:en:Eiso (era)|Eiso (Japan)]] 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:990|990]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Ichijō]] 's {{ill|Nyōgo|ja|女御|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyōgo|1=Nyōgo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10942767}} , [[:en:Fujiwara no Teishi|Fujiwara no Teishi]] , is elevated to the Rank of consort. Since the positions of [[:en:Grand empress dowager|Grand Empress Dowager]] , [[:en:Empress dowager|Empress Dowager]] , and {{ill|Chūgū|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūgū|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10875159}} were already filled by [[:en:Princess Masako (Reizei)|Imperial Princess Masako]] , {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}} , and [[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] , respectively, Junshi was designated as "Empress Palace" (皇后宮), while Teishi was called "Chūgū," marking the first instance of two consorts holding the Rank of empress simultaneously.
* [[:en:Kōgen|Kōgen (Japan)]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1256|1256]] [[:en:October 24|October 24]] ) – The era name changes from [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō (era)]] to Kōgen.
* [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11 (Julian [[:en:1274|1274]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – The [[:en:Yuan dynasty|Mongol Empire]] invades Tsushima and Iki for the first time, beginning the [[:en:Battle of Bun'ei|Battle of Bun'ei]] .
* [[:en:Meitoku|Meitoku]] 3 / [[:en:Genchū|Genchū]] 9 (Intercalary October) (Julian [[:en:1392|1392]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ) – The [[:en:Nanboku-chō period|Nanboku-chō period]] ends as the [[:en:Southern Court|Southern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Kameyama|Go-Kameyama]] surrenders the [[:en:Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]] to the [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court (Japan)]] 's [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , finalizing the {{ill|Meitoku Agreement|ja|明徳の和約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Agreement|1=Meitoku Peace Accord|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11087845}} .
== Births ==
* {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] , 11th {{ill|Shōgun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15903946}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1841|1841]] ).
== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|1=Kyōnyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6547451}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|1=Hōshu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11554990}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

* [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 19 (Gregorian [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ) – {{ill|Kyōnyo|ja|教如|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōnyo|1=Kyōnyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6547451}} , monk of the {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|Jōdo Shinshū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , 12th {{ill|Hōshu|ja|法主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōshu|1=Hōshu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11554990}} of [[:en:Higashi Hongan-ji|Higashi Hongan-ji]] (* [[:en:1558|1558]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 7 (Gregorian [[:en:1630|1630]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – [[:en:Tōdō Takatora|Tōdō Takatora]] , {{ill|Samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1556|1556]] ).
